professional_summary: Driven HR generalist with 6+ years of experience, possessing great expertise in staff coaching, training, development, and engagement. Looking to invigorate the corporate culture at Masus Corporation.

experience.description:
¢ Enhanced managerial performance up to 33% through benchmarking and streamlining the system for

employee records.

Executed a program to foster employee engagement within the corporate, having achieved 100%
employee participation.

Integrated 20+ staff in the aftermath of 2 acquisitions, steering flawless workforce assimilation into
core business operations. Contributed to profitable turnaround with >$1M in first-year savings.

¢ Handled all aspects of the recruitment and staffing procedures for a 400-employee company.

¢ Controlled corporate repositioning, guided recruitment of 100+ technical management staff for US HQ.

¢ Supported the company's long-term growth and expansion by managing and executing hiring policies,
procedures and innovative technology.
